interaction_phrase: researchers at Leibniz University Hannover and Physikalisch-Technische Bundesanstalt (PTB)
occurrence_sentence: Researchers at Leibniz University Hannover and Physikalisch-Technische Bundesanstalt (PTB) have now developed a new method that uses pulses of microwaves to help reduce error rates even further and provide reliable operations much faster.
